prompt: Three AMRs operate at a dock. At any time, at least one must be charging. Eventually, they can operate again after recharging.
constraints: At least one AMR must always be charging
DockAMR1 can operate after DockAMR1 has recharged
DockAMR2 can operate after DockAMR2 has recharged
DockAMR3 can operate after DockAMR3 has recharged

results.constraint: At least one AMR must always be charging

generation.raw_text: {"query":"A[] not (AMR1.charging == false && AMR2.charging == false && AMR3.charging == false)","explanation":"The natural-language constraint says that at least one AMR must always be charging. This is equivalent to saying it is forbidden that all AMRs are not charging at the same time.
